channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Google Confirms Eclipsa Audio Support for Android in 2025 - AOSP Update Brings Spatial Audio Tech to the Largest Number of Devices
item.description: Eclipsa Audio, a new spatial audio technology by Samsung and Google, is coming to Android Open Source Project (AOSP) release this year. This update will bring it to the largest number of devices, but lack of headphones support remains an issue.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Transforme su Oficina de Gestión de Proyectos en un motor estratégico
item.description: Hoy en día, muchas Project Management Office (Oficina de Gestión de Proyectos; de ahora en adelante PMO, por sus siglas en inglés) están atrapadas en un enfoque anticuado y teórico de la gestión de proyectos.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: El gasto en infraestructura ‘cloud’ se duplicó el tercer trimestre de 2024
item.description: El gasto en infraestructuras de computación y almacenamiento para despliegues en la nube ha alcanzado cotas sin precedentes, con un aumento interanual del 115,3% en el tercer trimestre de 2024.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Trump, a populist president, is flanked by tech billionaires at his inauguration
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Some of the most exclusive seats at President Donald Trump’s inauguration on Monday were reserved for powerful tech CEOs who also happen to be among the world’s richest men.
item.dc:creator: ALI SWENSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Billionaires, tech titans, presidents: A guide to who stood where at Trump’s inauguration
item.description: The crowded dais in the Capitol Rotunda on Inauguration Day featured four of the world’s five wealthiest men, five U.S. presidents, tech titans and business moguls, and two foreign leaders with prime spots.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Trump signs order to delay TikTok ban for 75 days
item.description: President Trump signed an executive order Monday giving TikTok an additional 75 days before a law banning the popular video-sharing platform takes effect.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Abrupt end to border app that brought nearly 1 million to US strands many in Mexico
item.description: The CBP One app that worked as recently as that morning would no longer be used to admit migrants after facilitating entry for nearly 1 million people since January 2023.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Elon Musk's prominence during inauguration ceremonies stamps tech titan's place in Trump's orbit
item.description: The blossoming relationship between President Donald Trump and tech titan Elon Musk was on full display throughout Monday's inauguration ceremonies.
item.dc:creator: Thomas Beaumont, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Build your focus stack with these proven tools and gadgets
item.description: This article is republished with permission from Wonder Tools, a newsletter that helps you discover the most useful sites and apps. Subscribe here. A dozen tabs open. Notifications pinging. I just opened my laptop and unread emails are already calling my name.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Caplan, Fast Company

item.title: Bitcoin soars past $100,000 ahead of possible early action on crypto by Trump
item.description: The price of bitcoin has surged to over $109,000 just hours ahead of President-elect Donald Trump's inauguration, as a pumped up cryptocurrency industry expects early action by him soon after he takes office.
item.dc:creator: Alan Suderman, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Content creators respond to TikTok's uncertain future in the US
item.description: TikTok content creators who make a living promoting their businesses and personal brands on the app were afraid that they would have to find new ways to engage consumers and make money as the app’s future in the United States remained uncertain.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: TikTok restoring service to US users
item.description: TikTok said Sunday it is "in the process" of restoring service to the U.S., just more than 12 hours after cutting off access to the popular video-sharing platform in anticipation of a ban.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Tech titans bend the knee to Trump
item.description: President-elect Trump’s inauguration will bring together some of the country’s most prominent technology leaders this week, underscoring the results of a months-long push by the industry to reconcile with the incoming president.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: TikTok app restored in US amid Trump assurances
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump plans to help the popular social media app TikTok stay in operation under his presidency.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: How TikTok grew from a fun app for teens into a potential national security threat
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — If it feels like TikTok has been around forever, that's probably because it has, at least if you're measuring via internet time.
item.dc:creator: DAVID HAMILTON, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Node.js set to stabilize type stripping
item.description: Node.js, the popular JavaScript runtime, is moving to stabilize type stripping, a feature that allows developers to execute TypeScript files without source maps or additional configuration, speeding up the development process. The Node.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Fake job interview emails installing hidden cryptocurrency mining malware
item.description: Scammers have a new trick where they pretend to be job recruiters to plant malicious apps on your devices. It all starts with a deceptive email.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: China gains ground
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: That Apple ID disabled message? It's a dangerous scam
item.description: Kurt the CyberGuy breaks down why those emails that warn that "Your Apple ID has been disabled" is most likely a scam. Here's how to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: For TikTok users, mourning, frustration and clinging to hope as TikTok ban looms
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The U.S. is inching closer and closer to a potential TikTok ban — with the nation's highest court upholding a law that's set to halt new downloads of the app starting Sunday.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS and MAE ANDERSON, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: TikTok refugees are pouring to Xiaohongshu. Here's what you need to know about the RedNote app
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — As the fate of TikTok hangs in the balance, U.S. TikTok users are flocking to the Chinese social media app Xiaohongshu, also called RedNote – making it the top downloaded app in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: FU TING and DAVID COHEN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: These mistakes could tank your credit score
item.description: Even small mistakes can negatively impact your credit score; here are some of the most common credit report errors and how you can fix them.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Noem calls for ‘smaller, more nimble’ CISA during nomination hearing
item.description: South Dakota Gov. Kristi Noem, Trump's pick to lead DHS, criticized CISA's work on misinformation and said the agency "has gotten far off mission." The post Noem calls for ‘smaller, more nimble’ CISA during nomination hearing first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Tomorrows Employees Will Want AI at Work
item.description: Research shows a quarter of US teens have used ChatGPT for schoolwork, indicating a future where AI is ubiquitous in the workforce.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Lenovo to acquire Infinidat to expand its storage folio
item.description: Lenovo Group has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Tel Aviv-based enterprise storage provider Infinidat, for an undisclosed sum, to expand its storage offerings. The startup provides several offerings, such as InfiniBox, Infinibox SSA, InfiniGuard, and InfuzeOS.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Biden's new executive order aims to shore up US cyber defenses
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden issued an executive order Thursday aimed at strengthening the nation's cybersecurity and making it easier to go after foreign adversaries or hacking groups that try to compromise U.S. internet and telecommunication systems.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Apple satellite patent takes big step toward stable communication
item.description: Apple has big plans for satellite services, a new patent filing confirms. It’s the latest nugget of information to roll down Apple Confidential mountain, a plan to make it much easier for devices to maintain connectivity as they move between satellites.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Network convergence will drive enterprise 6G wireless strategies
item.description: The traditional separation between Wi-Fi and cellular networks — a cornerstone of enterprise wireless planning — is facing fundamental challenges according to a new 6G vision statement released this week by the World Broadband Association, “It is important that the 6G era brings together cellular, W
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Taiwanese chipmaker TSMC posts 57% surge in profit thanks to the AI boom
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Taiwan computer chip maker TSMC reported Thursday that its profit in the last quarter rose 57%, buoyed by the artificial intelligence boom. The world’s biggest semiconductor manufacturer reported a net profit of 374.7 billion new Taiwan dollars ($11.4 billion), higher than expected.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Biden's big semiconductor law will ramp up US chip production -- but at a high cost, report finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A sweeping 2022 law, touted by President Joe Biden as a way to revive U.S. manufacturing of semiconductors and reduce the country’s reliance on foreign-made computer chips, will “sharply increase production’’ of semiconductors in the United States.
item.dc:creator: PAUL WISEMAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Microsoft adds ‘pay-as-you-go’ access for AI agents with M365 Copilot Chat
item.description: Microsoft has added a “pay-as-you-go” option to access AI agents alongside its free M365 Copilot Chat plan.
item.dc:creator: Computer World
